arts.ttl: ‘Perfect’: Thierry Henry and Micah Richards impressed by Arsenal duo after win over PSG

arts.ttl: Chelsea and PSG Summer Target Questions Why Clubs Hesitated to Pay His True Worth
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen broke his silence over the failed permanent transfer that didn’t happen this past summer window. The Nigerian was linked to Chelsea and Paris Saint-Germain until the final week. Nonetheless, neither pulled the trigger on a deal to secure him from Napoli. arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Martin Odegaard return hint dropped amid Real Madrid transfer battle
arts.sum: Arsenal are gearing up for Saturday's clash against Southampton as the fallout from their Champions League game against PSG continues following Tuesday night's match

arts.ttl: Chelsea Target PSG’s €30M-Rated Defender to Boost Defensive Line, Report Says
arts.sum: Lucas Beraldo is approaching his first full year with Paris Saint-Germain after joining the French giants from São Paulo FC this past January. Nonetheless, one Premier League club appears to be eyeing the defender for a potential move. arts.ttl: Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal Surpasses PSG and Real Madrid Stars in Impressive UCL Record
arts.sum: Seeing teenagers thrive in the big-time stage of the UEFA Champions League is slowly becoming the norm. Nonetheless, FC Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal surpassed a Paris Saint-Germain and Real Madrid player. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: PSG no match for 'superior' Arsenal
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique said he has no idea how long it will take to turn his side back into a European force after a humbling 2-0 Champions League loss at Arsenal on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 2-0 PSG: Player ratings as Gunners stroll to comfortable European victory
arts.sum: Goals from Kai Havertz and Bukayo Saka saw Arsenal take a two-goal cushion into the break following a dominant first-half display, with PSG unable to pose any meaningful threat to the home side. SUB: Jakub Kiwior (46' for Timber) - 6/10 - Didn't put a foot wrong during the second half and helped protect Raya from working too hard.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains what Jurrien Timber went off in Arsenal's win over PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta explains why Jurrien Timber went off at half-time of Tuesday's Champions League win over Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: THE NOTEBOOK: A former rival keen to stay undercover at the Emirates, another Sterling addition for the Gunners and why Ben White was absent from the squad that faced PSG
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL AT THE EMIRATES: Arsenal ran out comfortable 2-0 winners over PSG on Tuesday night thanks to goals from Kai Havertz and Bukayo Saka .

arts.ttl: It raises confidence and belief – Mikel Arteta lauds Arsenal’s win over PSG
arts.sum: The Gunners delivered an emphatic first-half performance against last season’s semi-finalists.
